Work & Projects

On-Site Construction — Residential Development, Perth WA

Reviewing and interpreting construction drawings including ensuite and bathroom plans on-site at a residential development. Hands-on experience reading technical documentation and applying design knowledge in the field.

About

Hi, I'm Sayem Hossain Niloy — a dedicated construction student based in Perth, Western Australia. I've completed an Advanced Diploma of Construction Design and am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Construction Project Management alongside a Diploma of Carpentry. I combine technical design knowledge with practical trade skills, aiming to bridge the gap between design and delivery in the construction industry.
